name: Jerk Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large glass or ceramic bowl, combine ground allspice, dried thyme, cayenne pepper, black pepper, ground sage, grated nutmeg, cinnamon, salt, garlic powder, and sugar.
2. Slowly whisk in soy sauce, vinegar, orange juice.
3. In a slow stream, whisk in olive oil. Add minced onion and green onions. Combine well.
4. Add chicken and allow to marinate for 1 hour at room temperature or overnight, covered in the refrigerator.
5. If using an outdoor grill, toss 1 or 2 bay leaves on the coals.
6. Grill the chicken for 6 minutes per side. Alternatively, broil indoors for 5-6 minutes per side, brushing well with the marinade while cooking.
7. For a hotter flavor, double the amounts of the first seven ingredients.
